query:
-- Check if order 1230001 has any items at all
SELECT COUNT(*) as item_count FROM order_items WHERE orderId = 1230001;

-- Also check if there are items that DON'T join to products across ALL orders in Jan-Feb
SELECT oi.orderId, oi.productId, oi.productName, oi.lineTotal / 100.0 as line_total_rupees
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id
INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND o.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59'
  AND p.id IS NULL
LIMIT 20;

SELECT oi.orderId, oi.productId, oi.productName, oi.lineTotal / 100.0 as line_total_rupees
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id
INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND o.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59'
  AND p.id IS NULL
LIMIT 20;
